---
title: "Paper Manuscript"
shorttitle: "Paper"
abstract: An Abstract
keywords: [keyword1, keyword2]
thanks: Thanks to everyone for checking this out.
reference-section-title: References
bibliography: ../bibliography/project.bib
csl: ../bibliography/chicago-parenthetical.csl
format:
  aog-article-pdf:
    keep-tex: false
    fig-pos: "h"
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{dcolumn}
#  submittable-pdf:
#     keep-tex: false
#     fig-pos: "!t"
#     include-in-header: 
#       text: |
#         \usepackage{dcolumn}
#  submittable-docx: default
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("utils","check_packages.R"))
source(here("utils","functions.R"))
load(here("data", "data_constructed", "analytical_data.RData"))
```

```{r}
#| label: set-palettes

palette_scenario <- c(
  "absorbing state"       = "goldenrod",   
  "high peak, resilient"  = "royalblue",   
  "high peak, decay"      = "navy",   
  "low peak, resilient"   = "coral",  
  "low peak, decay"       = "orangered"    
)

palette_mar_growth <- c(
  "progress" = "tomato",
  "plateau"  = "navy"
)

palette_pop_share <- c(
  "even"  = "goldenrod",  
  "uneven" = "royalblue"
)

palette_group <- c(
  "A"  = "navy",
  "B"  = "tomato",
  "AB" = "gold"
)

palette_gen <- c(
  "1st gen"  = "tomato",
  "2nd gen"  = "darkgreen",
  "3rd gen"  = "navy",
  "4th+ gen" = "gold",
  "Unmixed"  = "grey30"
)
```


```{r}
#| label: clean-up-labels

sims_pop <- sims_pop |>
  mutate(
    group = factor(group, levels = 1:3, labels = c("A", "B", "AB")),
    pop_share = factor(pop_share, levels = c("uneven", "even"), 
                       labels = c("uneven (85/15)", "even (50/50)")),
    scenario = str_replace(scenario, "_", " peak, "),
    scenario = str_replace(scenario, "total peak, rigid", "absorbing state"),
    scenario = factor(
      scenario,
      levels = c("absorbing state", "high peak, resilient", "high peak, decay",
                 "low peak, resilient", "low peak, decay")))
```

```{r}
#| label: count-pop-group
#| include: false

total_pop_group <- map(300:500, function(x) {
  sims_pop |>
    get_pop_alive(x) |>
    group_by(group, pop_share, mar_growth, scenario) |>
    summarize(year = x, population = n()) |>
    ungroup()
}) |>
  bind_rows()

total_pop <- total_pop_group |>
  group_by(year, pop_share, mar_growth, scenario) |>
  summarize(population = sum(population))

# add share to pop by group
total_pop_group <- total_pop |>
  rename(pop_total = population) |>
  right_join(total_pop_group) |>
  mutate(share = population / pop_total) |>
  select(year, group, pop_share, mar_growth, scenario, population, share)
```

{{< include main_manuscript.md >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::

# Tables and Figures

```{r}
#| label: fig-scenarios
#| fig-cap: Four different group assignment scenarios for individuals of mixed parentage as a function of the proportion of their group A ancestry

get_group_probs <- function(a_param, b_param) {
  
  prop_a <- seq(from = 0.005, to = 0.995, by = 0.005)

  tibble(prop_a, 
         lor_a = a_param[1] + a_param[2] * prop_a + a_param[3] * prop_a^2 + a_param[4] * prop_a^3,
         lor_b = b_param[1] + b_param[2] * prop_a + b_param[3] * prop_a^2 + b_param[4] * prop_a^3,
         lor_ab = rep(0, length(prop_a)),
         prob_a = exp(lor_a) / (exp(lor_a) + exp(lor_b) + exp(lor_ab)),
         prob_b = exp(lor_b) / (exp(lor_a) + exp(lor_b) + exp(lor_ab)),
         prob_ab = exp(lor_ab) / (exp(lor_a) + exp(lor_b) + exp(lor_ab))) |>
    select(prop_a, starts_with("prob_")) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("prob_"), names_prefix = "prob_",
                 names_to = "group", values_to = "prob") |>
    mutate(group = str_to_upper(group),
           group = factor(group, levels = c("A", "B", "AB")))
}

# high resilient
gp_hr <- get_group_probs(a_param = c(-4.132, 6.113, -4.924, 3.713),
                         b_param = c(0.881, -8.661, 9.544, -6.34)) |>
  mutate(scenario_peak = "high peak", scenario_decline = "resilient")

# high decay
gp_hd <- get_group_probs(a_param = c(-0.085, -15.448, 30.642, -12.46),
                 b_param = c(2.412, -6.265, -12.038, 16.068)) |>
  mutate(scenario_peak = "high peak", scenario_decline = "decay")

# low resilient
gp_lr <- get_group_probs(a_param = c(-3.562, 9.362, -7.244, 2.776),
                 b_param = c(1.269, -2.795, 0.214, -2.142)) |>
  mutate(scenario_peak = "low peak", scenario_decline = "resilient")

# low decay
gp_ld <- get_group_probs(a_param = c(-0.65, -4.209, 11.594, -3.497),
                 b_param = c(2.956, -5.734, -5.348, 7.796)) |>
  mutate(scenario_peak = "low peak", scenario_decline = "decay")

bind_rows(gp_hr, gp_hd, gp_lr, gp_ld) |>
  mutate(scenario_decline = factor(scenario_decline, 
                                   levels = c("resilient", "decay"))) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = prop_a, y = prob, group = group, color = group))+
  geom_line(size = 1)+
  facet_grid(scenario_decline~scenario_peak)+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1))+
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_group)+
  labs(x = "proportion group A ancestry", 
       y = "probability of group assignment")+
  theme_bw()
```


```{r}
#| label: fig-biracial-pop-scenario
#| fig-cap: The percent of the population identified as biracial (AB), across different scenarios

total_pop_group |>
  filter(group == "AB") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = share, group = scenario, color = scenario))+
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.7)+
  facet_grid(pop_share~mar_growth)+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)+
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_scenario)+
  labs(y = "share of population identifying as biracial",
       color = "classification\nscenario")+
  theme_bw()
```


```{r}
#| label: fig-biracial-share-scenario
#| fig-cap: The size of the biracial population at the conclusion of the simulation as a fraction of the absorbing state scenario

total_pop_group |>
  filter(scenario == "absorbing state") |>
  rename(share_absorbing = share) |>
  select(year, group, pop_share, mar_growth, share_absorbing) |>
  right_join(total_pop_group, 
             by = c("year", "group", "pop_share", "mar_growth")) |>
  mutate(prop_absorb = share/share_absorbing) |>
  filter(group == "AB", year == 500, scenario != "absorbing state") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = scenario, y = prop_absorb))+
  geom_segment(aes(yend = 0))+
  geom_point()+
  facet_grid(pop_share~mar_growth)+
  coord_flip()+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1))+
  labs(y = "Size of biracial (AB) population as fraction of absorbing state scenario",
       x = NULL)+
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-group-dist
#| fig-cap: The distribution of groups over time, across different classification scenarios. All cases use the "progress" scenario for intergroup partnering.
#| fig-height: 7

total_pop_group |>
  filter(mar_growth == "progress") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = share, fill = group))+
  facet_grid(scenario~pop_share)+
  geom_area(color = NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_group)+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
          
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-ancestry-share
#| fig-cap: Mean proportion of Group A and B ancestry by identified group among new births over time
#| fig-subcap:
#|    - "Uneven (85/15), Group A"
#|    - "Even (50/50), Group A"
#|    - "Uneven (85/15), Group B"
#|    - "Even (50/50), Group B"
#| layout-ncol: 2

ancestry_prop <- sims_pop |>
  filter(dob >= 300) |>
  mutate(year = floor(dob)) |>
  group_by(year, group, pop_share, mar_growth, scenario) |>
  summarize(prop_a = mean(ancestry_group1),
            prop_b = mean(ancestry_group2))

ancestry_prop |>
  filter(pop_share == "uneven (85/15)" & scenario != "absorbing state") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = prop_a, group = group, color = group))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.85, linetype = 2)+
  geom_line()+
  facet_grid(mar_growth~scenario)+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)+
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_group)+
  labs(x = "year of birth", y = "mean shar of group A ancestry")+
  theme_bw()

ancestry_prop |>
  filter(pop_share == "even (50/50)", scenario != "absorbing state") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = prop_a, group = group, color = group))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = 2)+
  geom_line()+
  facet_grid(mar_growth~scenario)+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)+
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_group)+
  labs(x = "year of birth", y = "mean share of group A ancestry")+
  theme_bw()

ancestry_prop |>
  filter(pop_share == "uneven (85/15)", scenario != "absorbing state") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = prop_b, group = group, color = group))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.15, linetype = 2)+
  geom_line()+
  facet_grid(mar_growth~scenario)+  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)+
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_group)+
  labs(x = "year of birth", y = "mean share of group B ancestry")+
  theme_bw()

ancestry_prop |>
  filter(pop_share == "even (50/50)", scenario != "absorbing state") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = prop_b, group = group, color = group))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = 2)+
  geom_line()+
  facet_grid(mar_growth~scenario)+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)+
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_group)+
  labs(x = "year of birth", y = "mean share of group B ancestry")+
  theme_bw()
```
